MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-16-2001 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 210 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, LORI HARRIS, BEN

JUDGE-T.MELLON, CLERK-J.JASMIN, RPTR. LEE BATARA. PLTFF'S ATTY. RICHARD J. ALEXANDER; DEFENDANTS-IPP. PARTIES STIP THAT ACCRUED RENTALS IS REDUCED AT $1500 SO LONG AS IT IS PAID ON OR BEFORE 7-26-01 AT 4PM. STARTING AUGUST 1 RENTALS IS REDUCED AT $300 A MONTH AND PLTIFF WILL MAKE REPAIRS ON LEASED PREMISES. IF $1500 IS PAID 7-26/01, THE PLAINTIFF WILL MOVE TO DISMISS CASE. IF NOT, PLAINTIFF WILL MOVE FOR JUDGMENT EVICTING DEFENDANTS FROM LEASED PREMISES. PLAINTIFF WILL PREPARE ORDER REFLECTING THIS STIP FOR THE SIGNATURE OF JUDGE WHO WILL RETAIN JUR. IN THE CASE.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION JUDGMENT OF JUL-19-2001 SET ASIDE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, LORI HARRIS, BEN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 141 EDDY, #525, SF $1,500.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00, DEFENDANTS TO PAY $1500 AS RENTALS FM. MAR TO JUL PROVIDED PD BY 7/26/01 PTFF WILL DISMISS COMPLAINT W/PREJUDICE AND IF PD. RENTALS REMAIN AT $300 AND IF NOT PAID, PLTFF, CAN OBTAIN JUDGMENT BY DECLARATION.
